titles.title: Victory Is Mine (I'm a nazarite, separated from this world)

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I'm a nazarite, separated from this world to serve you Lord Ordained before the world was formed To bring forth fruits of rigteousness by Your Spirit, Lord But sometimes I see myself, Struggling on my weaknesses So help me Lord to stand and claim Your Word

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: That victory is mine, victory is ours We will not give up and we will overcome The Lord is on our side, Who can be against us? And I claim, victory is mine And I claim, victory is mine

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I trust You, Lord with all my heart Believe all that Your Word has promised for Your Bride She's the final voice to this final age More than conqueror and able to overcome She's a Bride that's wrinkle-free, Spotless and justified And I'm a part of this invincible army

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Victory is mine, victory is ours We will not give up and we will overcome The Lord is on our side, Who can be against us? And I claim, victory is mine And I claim, victory is mine

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Many were wounded in the battle Many were weary and so tired But something inside us keeps on telling us Press on and you can make it through

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Victory is mine, victory is ours We will not give up and we will overcome The Lord is on our side, Who can be against us? So we claim, victory is ours… Yes we claim, victory is ours… Yes I claim, victory is mine…
